model_phrasing: gpt-5 family detected from the system prompt; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4

frame.objective: Validate or reject the PKR-P1 semantic-gate and narrow-diff claims without editing.

allowed: Read the one-file candidate diff and replay each named focused gate once.
forbidden: Edit or fix files, measure performance, rerun until green, commit, push, merge, release, publish, or deploy.

frame.human_confirmation_boundary: Only the human may change targets or authority.

assignment: Replay once: candidate changed path is only pkg/core/lite/src/scope.ts; diff hash matches; git diff --check; role-tags, scope, structured-lifetime, exec-stream, SDK tests, Lite typecheck, and SDK typecheck. Deterministically inspect the diff for added comments, Object.freeze, callback/runtime ctx or scope arguments, new helpers/getters/glue types, public interface edits, and AbortController behavior edits. Reject unsupported performance claims.
budget_and_stop_rule: One replay per claim, 15 minutes. Stop on the first deterministic result for each claim.
hand_back_rule: Reject missing, stale, contradicted, non-replayable, or wrong-source evidence. Do not repair.
output_schema: Use the exact audit-trace blocks from references/roles/validator.md and save one immutable verification file under /tmp.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
